evals.prompt: Turn this feature request into a task I can hand to Codex: add CSV export to our Laravel admin, but do not alter customer-facing routes.
evals.expected_output: Produces a standalone contract with discovery paths, boundaries, acceptance behavior, Laravel checks, evidence, and escalation conditions.

evals.prompt: Our agents keep “fixing” flaky tests by deleting assertions. Rewrite the maintenance ticket so that cannot count as success.
evals.expected_output: Defines protected test intent, root-cause outcome, allowed changes, proof, and explicit prohibited shortcuts.
